title: Exact MILP formulation improvement for network design
prompt: Researchers derive a stronger exact MILP formulation for a capacitated network-design problem. It has the same feasible integer solutions and objective as a standard formulation but a tighter linear relaxation. Frame the business value without claiming a better operational solution solely from formulation strength.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: minimize fixed opening and routing cost
model_specification.mechanism: Valid inequalities tighten the relaxation and can reduce search while preserving the original feasible integer set.

prohibited_inferences: The stronger formulation creates a lower-cost feasible plan than the true optimum
